---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for bayesEfron
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

Describe the meta-analytic or deconvolution problem the feature
would address. What inputs do you have, what output do you want,
and what is currently missing or awkward?

## Proposed API

If you have a concrete idea of how the feature should be exposed,
sketch the call signature and the return value:

```r
# example of the proposed call
new_function(theta_hat, sigma, ..., new_argument = ...)
```

## Alternatives considered

Existing workarounds with `bayesEfron` or other packages, and why
they fall short.

## Additional context

Links to relevant papers, datasets, or downstream consumers.
